extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked in final kilometer from Adam YATES leadout to take stage 20, beating VINGEGAARD in sprint finish after controlled GC group arrival
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam led out POGAČAR in final kilometer, suggesting UAE prioritized stage win over keeping twin off podium
CORT Magnus attacked early with polka dot jersey GESCHKE chasing, revealing points jersey tactically more important than breakaway success
PIDCOCK Thomas sacrificed energy keeping RODRÍGUEZ Carlos in frame after early crash, showing INEOS prioritizing podium over stage
POGAČAR took inside line advantage VINGEGAARD conceded in headwind sprint, suggesting Jonas prioritized GC security over stage

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: still had sprint power on final climb after 3-week tour, suggesting deeper reserves than stage racing deficit implied
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: worked for POGAČAR despite twin Simon racing for fourth overall, revealing UAE team hierarchy over family loyalty
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: negative: crash on first ascent required PIDCOCK rescue effort, exposing vulnerability on technical descents under pressure
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: chased early break for KOM points rather than stage win, showing polka dot defense requires constant vigilance
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: burned matches to pace RODRÍGUEZ back after crash, demonstrating domestique commitment despite own GC ambitions earlier tour
